items.title: Sources: Bournemouth close on Rose appointment
items.summary: Bournemouth are closing in on Marco Rose as their new manager, sources have told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Inaugural Boulders Classic goes to Shubhankar
items.summary: It is his first win on the tour since the McLeod Russel Tour Championship in Kolkata in December 2017
